isSaved.description: Indicates whether the current state has been saved

lastSavedTime.description: Timestamp (epoch) of the last successful save operation

isPublishedWithValidPackage.description: Indicates whether the application is published with at least one valid package

hasBuildErrors.description: Indicates whether the last build encountered errors

lastBuildTime.description: Timestamp (epoch) of the last build operation

isCurrentVersionPublished.description: Indicates whether the current version of the application is published

isPlanOnly.description: Indicates whether the application contains plan only.
